title: khoj-ai/khoj
summary: Self-hosted AI second brain supporting document search, custom agents, scheduled automations, and deep research. Turns any online or local LLM (GPT, Claude, Gemini, Llama, Qwen, Mistral) into a personal autonomous AI. 35,095 stars, AGPL-3.0.
chinese_summary: 自托管 AI 第二大脑，支持文档搜索、自定义 Agent、定时自动化和深度研究，可将任意 LLM 转为个人 AI 助手，35,095 星。
